column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Polk County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
Smaller word of mouth groups said this was on the ground near Berkeley road
This is just south of you.

Disappointed that there’s no information on this one anywhere that I’m searching now. No active radar map tracking it by anyone. No alerts on my phone about it. Only weather radio alert. And it’s very close to us.
Still pouring...dozed off...didn't know the arrow was pointing at us...glad it's no longer dark
